chunks.title: Woe to the Oppressors
chunks.reason: A prophetic oracle pronouncing judgment on corrupt judges and leaders.

chunks.title: Assyria as God's Rod
chunks.reason: A speech describing Assyria's role as an instrument of judgment and its subsequent pride.

chunks.title: The Remnant Returns
chunks.reason: An oracle concerning the future hope of Israel's remnant and God's deliverance.

chunks.title: The Fall of Assyria
chunks.reason: A narrative description of the Assyrian army's advance and final destruction.
